html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events

Floating Lanterns are Items exclusive to Lunar New Year Events in Don't Starve Together. They can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nugget at a Shrine.

When placed on the ground, they emit light in a small radius for a duration of 6 Days. They also float around slowly when placed in the Ocean. They spontaneously combust upon expiring.

Trivia

  • The Floating Lantern was introduced during the Year of the Carrat event in 2020.

Exclusive to:

“How illuminating!”
–Wilson
“Ha! Fire beats water!”
–Willow
“Is floaty water light.”
–Wolfgang
“Such a happy little glow... I despise it.”
–Wendy
“GET OUT OF THE WATER BROTHER, IT'S UNSAFE!”
–WX-78
“The balloon seems a bit redundant, doesn't it?”
–Wickerbottom
“Light the way, little lantern!”
–Woodie
“It's oddly beautiful.”
–Maxwell
“The small vessel shall light my way.”
–Wigfrid
“We like to watch it paddle around.”
–Webber
“Float along, little lantern.”
–Warly
“Little Floater”
–Wormwood
“Nice to have some more light out here on the water.”
–Winona
“I'm sorry, but the souls I take cannot follow you.”
–Wortox
“Pretty water floaty.”
–Wurt
“It'll help us find the sea monsters. I know they're out there!”
–Walter
“The ocean could use a bit more light.”
–Wanda
Floating Lanterns are Items exclusive to Lunar New Year Events in Don't Starve Together. They can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nugget at a Shrine.
When placed on the ground, they emit light in a small radius for a duration of 6 Days. They also float around slowly when placed in the Ocean. They spontaneously combust upon expiring.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Floating Lantern was introduced during the Year of the Carrat event in 2020.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đèn Lồng Nổi là Vật Phẩm dành riêng cho Sự Kiện Tết Nguyên Đán trong Don't Starve Together. Chúng có thể được mua bằng cách đổi lấy 3 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn tại Đền Thờ.

'''Floating Lanterns''' are [[Items]] exclusive to Lunar New Year [[Events]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. They can be acquired in exchange for 3 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] at a Shrine.

When placed on the ground, they emit light in a small radius for a duration of 6 Days. They also float around slowly when placed in the [[Ocean]]. They spontaneously combust upon expiring.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Floating Lantern was introduced during the [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020.
